entity.label: Kishion
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Hardness, a city of Issachar assigned to the Gershonite Levites (Josh. 19:20), the same as Kishon (21:28).

nodes.label: Kishion
nodes.description: Hardness, a city of Issachar assigned to the Gershonite Levites (Josh. 19:20), the same as Kishon (21:28).

verses.text: And Rabbith, and Kishion, and Abez,
And out of the tribe of Issachar, Kishon with her suburbs, Dabareh with her suburbs,
